gems.title: 真爱留声
gems.summary: 年轻女子给已故姐姐发送的搞笑自白语音留言无意中被转给了陌生人，而这个陌生人竟隔着遥远的距离爱上了她。
gems.summaryEn: A young woman's hilariously confessional voicemails to her late sister are unknowingly redirected to a stranger, who begins to fall in love from afar.
gems.whyWatch: 用声音编织的意外爱情，温柔又治愈。
gems.whyWatchEn: A tender, unexpected romance woven through voicemails that will warm your heart.
gems.audience: 喜欢轻松浪漫、不落俗套爱情故事的观众。
gems.audienceEn: Fans of lighthearted, unconventional love stories with a modern twist.
